items.title: Spektakel bij Real: Mbappé voorkomt dreun, blessure Bellingham, Rayo met negen
items.summary: Real Madrid ontsnapte aan een pijnlijke middag tegen Rayo Vallecano, dat twee keer rood kreeg. Kylian Mbappé benutte in de negende minuut van de blessuretijd een strafschop en schoot De Koninklijke naar de overwinning. Smet op de zege: de blessure van Jude Bellingham.

items.title: PSV neemt voorschot op landstitel met kinderlijk eenvoudige zege op Feyenoord
items.summary: PSV heeft zondagmiddag met speels gemak gewonnen van Feyenoord. Na ruim een kwartier kon de rem erop bij de koploper van de Eredivisie, die de bezoekers de snelste 3-0 achterstand ooit had bezorgd. Het gat met de Rotterdammers, de nummer twee op de ranglijst, bedraagt nu zeventien punten.

items.title: Manchester United v Fulham: Premier League – live
items.summary: ⚽️ Updates from the 2pm (GMT) kick-off at Old Trafford ⚽️ Live scores | Full table | Follow on Bluesky | Mail Luke Five minutes to kick off. Are you excited? The fan protest outside the stadium is presumably still in full swing: we’ll update you on that when we have more. Continue reading...

items.title: Man City v Chelsea: Women’s Super League – live
items.summary: ⚽️ Updates from the 2.30pm (GMT) kick-off at the Etihad ⚽️ Live scores | Full table | Follow on Bluesky | Mail Emillia After six consecutive years as champions, Chelsea find their once firm grip on the Women’s Super League crown has been reduced to a little finger clinging to the side of the trophy. They head to the Etihad Stadium on Sunday nine points behind their opponents and surely sensing that only a win could prevent the title from transferring to Manchester City’s outstretched arms. The big surprise here is the absence of Lucy Bronze for Chelsea. She has a ‘minor injury’, we are told. That’s a massive blow for the visitors. Manchester City, meanwhile, are overjoyed to welcome back Mary Fowler after her lengthy injury absence. Continue reading...

items.title: Hoe PSV met een simpele truc Feyenoord wegvaagde
items.summary: PSV heeft een voorschot genomen om de landstitel door Feyenoord van het kastje naar de muur te tikken: 3-0. Analyse van een wedstrijd waarin Feyenoord als een kip zonder kop verdedigde na een simpele tactische truc van PSV.

items.title: 'Emphatic finish!' | Sensational Cunha strike doubles Man Utd's lead over Fulham
items.summary: Sensational Cunha strike doubles Manchester Utd's lead over Fulham in the Premier League.

items.title: VI Live: Borges met rood van het veld bij Feyenoord na charge op Driouech
items.summary: Zondagmiddag om 14.30 uur staat de topper tussen PSV en Feyenoord op het programma. PSV hoopt de concurrent een mokerslag uit te kunnen delen in de titelstrijd, terwijl de Rotterdammers de marge kunnen terugbrengen naar elf punten. Volg de wedstrijd op de voet in de VI Live.

items.title: European live updates: Man United look to continue...
United fans don clown masks in anti-Glazer protest...
items.summary: A number of protesters wore clown masks as fans marched towards Old Trafford to express anger with the Glazers and Sir Jim Ratcliffe

items.title: Sources: Liverpool go for Sunderland's Geertruida
items.summary: Liverpool are interested in signing Netherlands international Lutsharel Geertruida on loan from RB Leipzig, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: Szoboszlai: Liverpool future 'not in my hands'
items.summary: Liverpool midfielder Dominik Szoboszlai has admitted he would love to extend his stay at the club but said the decision is "not in [his] hands".

items.title: Snoop Dogg wants to make Swansea 'global name'
items.summary: Swansea City investor Snoop Dogg has said he wants to take the side back to the Premier League, and establish them as a 'global name'.

items.title: VI Live: hekkensluiter Heracles leidt nipt tegen Fortuna
items.summary: Welkom in de VI Live van zondag 1 februari. Hier nemen we je mee in drie Eredivisie-duels, een topper in Engeland en alle andere hoogtepunten op de (inter)nationale velden.

items.title: Bellingham suffers injury on Real duty
items.summary: England midfielder Jude Bellingham is substituted with what appears to be a hamstring injury early in Real Madrid's La Liga match against Rayo Vallecano.

items.title: Majborough stamps his class on Dublin Chase
items.summary: Majborough got his act together with a brilliant victory in the Ladbrokes Dublin Chase at Leopardstown.

items.title: Rodri starts for Man City at Spurs, who lose Spence to injury LIVE!
Crystal Palace agree £48m deal for Strand Larsen as Liverpool eye Geertruida move
items.summary: Palace’s £48m bid accepted; Mateta takes Milan medical Slot keen on bulking up squad with versatile defender Crystal Palace have had a £48m bid for Jørgen Strand Larsen accepted by Wolves, after the south London club reignited their interest in the striker. The Norway international, who joined Wolves on a permanent deal from Celta Vigo last summer for £23m, has scored one Premier League goal this season. The 25-year-old was a substitute for Wolves’s 2-0 home defeat to Bournemouth on Saturday. Continue reading...

items.title: Watford boss Gracia resigns after three months
items.summary: Javi Gracia resigns as Watford manager after just over three months in job.

items.title: Martindale moves upstairs as Bartley becomes Livingston boss
items.summary: Marvin Bartley becomes Livingston manager with David Martindale taking up a new role as sporting director at the Scottish Premiership bottom club.

items.title: Wolves accept reduced £48m offer for Strand Larsen
items.summary: Wolves have accepted a reduced offer worth £48m for striker Jorgen Strand Larsen from Crystal Palace.
